name: repo_default_check
description: Portable autoresearch default objective for LocalhouseDesigns. Replace the command with a repo-specific evaluation when needed.
experiment_commands: python -c "import json, pathlib, subprocess; cmd=r'npm test -- --watch=false'; rc=subprocess.call(cmd, shell=True); p=pathlib.Path(r'.test-temp/autoresearch-repo-eval.json'); p.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True); p.write_text(json.dumps({'score': {'value': 1.0 if rc == 0 else 0.0}, 'command': {'returncode': rc, 'kind': 'npm_test'}}), encoding='utf-8'); raise SystemExit(rc)"
